summary: Completed frontend testing of Year-based Filters on Trades page. All 8 test cases passed. Year filter dropdown with CalendarDays icon works correctly. Default year 2026 shows 8 active trades (1 ongoing + 7 pending) from 2025 that are NOT completed/cancelled/washout. Cancelled trade BAH55 correctly hidden in 2026 view. 2025 view shows all 9 trades including BAH55. 2024 shows 0 trades. Clear Filter button and combined filters work correctly.
passed_tests: Year filter dropdown appears with CalendarDays icon and data-testid='trades-year-filter'
2026 filter shows 8 trades: 1 ongoing + 7 pending (trades from 2025 NOT completed/cancelled/washout)
2026 filter does NOT show cancelled trade BAH55 from 2025
2025 filter shows ALL 9 trades from 2025 including cancelled BAH55
2024 filter shows 0 trades (no trades exist for 2024)
Clear Filter button appears when year is not 2026 and resets year to 2026
Year filter works in combination with other filters (search, commodity, seller, buyer)
critical_code_review_comments: Year filter logic correctly implemented using COMPLETED_STATUSES, CANCELLED_STATUSES, WASHOUT_STATUSES from constants.js
yearFilteredTrades useMemo correctly filters: for current year shows trades from any year with non-terminal status, for past years shows only trades from that exact year
getTradeYear helper correctly parses both DD/MM/YYYY and ISO date formats
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 9 trades from 2025 in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Year filter feature fully tested and working. Trades page has 5 sections: Ongoing, Pending, Completed, Washout, Cancelled. All 9 existing trades are from 2025 (contract dates in 2025). One trade BAH55 is cancelled. When viewing 2026 (current year), shows 8 trades that are NOT completed/cancelled/washout. When viewing 2025, shows all 9 trades. When viewing 2024, shows 0 trades. Year filter dropdown has data-testid='trades-year-filter'. Clear Filter button has data-testid='trades-clear-filter'.

filter_logic.current_year_2026: Shows trades from any year with non-terminal status (not completed/cancelled/washout)
filter_logic.past_year_2025: Shows only trades from 2025 regardless of status
